items.title: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.

items.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.

items.title: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC
items.lead_paragraph: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC, bringing global leadership in finance, technology, and governance.

items.title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.

items.title: A scorecard for the AI age
items.lead_paragraph: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

items.title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
items.lead_paragraph: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.

items.title: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
items.lead_paragraph: Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company.

items.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.

items.title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
items.lead_paragraph: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.

items.title: Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
items.lead_paragraph: We’re introducing new Gemini models, including Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite and 3.5 Flash Cyber.

items.title: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber
items.lead_paragraph: Google introduces Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber, a lightweight cybersecurity model to find and patch vulnerabilities.

items.title: Our approach to bioresilience
items.lead_paragraph: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs are sharing our joint approach to bioresilience and AI models.

items.title: The State of Simulation for Physical AI: An Overview
Grabette: an open system to record robot-manipulation data
Newer Models, Same Advantage

What building Shippy taught us about building agents
Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn’t.
Welcome Inkling by Thinking Machines

Apply for Anthropic’s AI for Science rare disease research grants
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is sharing a focused call for AI for Science applications centered specifically on rare genetic diseases. Accepted applicants will receive up to $50,000 in Claude credits over six months, with the goal of building a community of researchers looking into how AI can reshape our understanding

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.

items.title: Agents for financial services
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: We're releasing ten new Cowork and Claude Code plugins, integrations with the Microsoft 365 suite, new connectors, and an MCP app for financial services and insurance organizations.

items.title: Introducing Claude for Teachers
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

items.title: Anthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is committing $10M to Canadian research institutions to fund the next generation of AI research.
